title: MANIT Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MNIT) has officially released the recruitment notification for the various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the MANIT Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If...
